_comment: SHIP CONFIG TEMPLATES - Default loadout for each ship (empty slots). Read by ShipConfigTemplateReader.java. Fields: id (unique config ID), level (ship level for this config), shipGUID (which Ship card this config is for), slotConfigs (array of {slotID, itemGUID (0=empty), consumableGUID (0=none)}). The number of slotConfigs must match the total Slots count on the Ship card.
